name: Legacy Overhaul
description: Modernize legacy systems safely. Build first, verify, then redesign.

phases.name: Build
phases.task_template: Phase 1 — Build: Stabilize and modernize legacy code. Goal: ${goal}
phases.checkpoint: Legacy code documented and tests added

phases.name: Quality
phases.task_template: Phase 2 — Quality: Verify modernization and audit compliance. Goal: ${goal}

phases.name: Vision
phases.task_template: Phase 3 — Vision: Redesign architecture for the modernized system. Goal: ${goal}
